AvgMemoryUtilisationLessThan80:
/* CONSTR-MET-GLOBAL */ /*INSERT INTO AvgMemoryUtilisationLessThan80*/ 
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM AvgMemoryUtilisationContext HAVING AvgMemoryUtilisationContext.metricValue < 80.0
AvgMemoryUtilisationSLO:
/* SLO-any */ /*INSERT INTO AvgMemoryUtilisationSLO*/
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM AvgMemoryUtilisationLessThan80

RawMemoryUtilisationContext:
/* RAW-CTX-PER_INSTANCE */ /*INSERT INTO RawMemoryUtilisationContext*/
SELECT DISTINCT * FROM CPUUtilisationSensor OUTPUT EVERY 5 SECONDS
AvgMemoryUtilisationContext:
/* COMP-CTX-AGG-any */ /*INSERT INTO AvgMemoryUtilisationContext*/
SELECT DISTINCT EVALAGG( 'mean(RawRAMUtilisation)', 'RawRAMUtilisation', RawMemoryUtilisationContext ) AS metricValue,
       3 AS level,
       current_timestamp AS timestamp
FROM RawMemoryUtilisationContext#length(18 ) AS RawMemoryUtilisationContext
 OUTPUT EVERY 1 MINUTES
